description.value: Magically seal one door, window, gate, chest, or similar closure. Add 4 to die results for anyone attempting to open it. You and designated creatures can open freely.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = fails
- 1 = 10 minutes
- 2 = until dispelled
- 3 = add 1 additional penalty (+5 total)
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
